title: Hide main table feature doesn't work in The phone app version

posts.author: amirh (Amir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

As we all saw there were some few discussions about the inability to hide specific columns in the main table as it opens new view if so. Recently a new feature was added which enables hiding the whole main table and it works just fine in the desktop version. But when I checked it’s influence on the app it turns out that it doesn’t work despite the fact that the user that accessed Monday from the phone app should not see the main table.

What are you trying to achieve

To fix the bug that prevents the feature “Hide main table” from working correctly or at all in the app version.
